senses.example: Our new production of Romeo and Juliet is currently in rehearsal.
senses.example_zh: 我们的新版《罗密欧与朱丽叶》正在排练之中。

derivatives: rehearse v. 排演;背诵;(通过排演)训练

entries.mnemonic: re(again)+store(储存)→一再储备能量才能恢复体能→恢复

senses.def_en: to bring back to an original or normal condition
senses.example: I feel quite restored (to health) after my holiday. // It's hard to restore a broken mirror.
senses.example_zh: 休假后我感觉恢复了健康。// 破镜难圆。

senses.def_en: to give back (sb. or sth. that was lost or taken)
senses.example: The stolen property must be restored to its owner.

derivatives: restoration n. 归还原主;恢复;修复

senses.example: Enough time should be left for sleep because that will help one become refreshed.
senses.example_zh: 应该留足够的时间睡觉，因为那有助于恢复精力。

derivatives: refreshing a. 使精神振作的

senses.def_en: to repair a building or old furniture so that it is in good condition again
senses.example: The hotel has been renovated and redecorated.
senses.example_zh: 这家宾馆已经翻新并重新装修了。

derivatives: renovation n. 整修;更新,使恢复元气

senses.example: She made a quick recovery from her illness.
The owner has offered a reward for the recovery of the stolen goods.
senses.example_zh: 失主已经悬赏寻找被窃物品。

senses.def_en: to get back sth. that you lost
senses.example: A good name lost is hard to regain.

senses.def_en: to make (sb./sth.) strong, healthy, or active again
senses.example: Hot coffee revived me; I had been cold and tired. // The roses revived after the rain.
senses.example_zh: 热咖啡使又冷又累的我恢复了精力。// 雨后玫瑰花恢复了娇艳。

derivatives: revival n. 更新,重新开始

senses.def_en: to succeed in achieving sth. after trying for a long time
senses.example: We have to make sustaining efforts to attain our goal.
senses.example_zh: 为了达到目标，我们必须做出不懈的努力。

senses.def_en: sth. important that you succeed in doing by your own efforts
senses.example: Even a small success gives you a sense of achievement.
senses.example_zh: 即便是小小的成功也给人一种成就感。

senses.example: Such a goal is impossible of achievement.
senses.example_zh: 这样的一个目标是不可能完成的。

entries.mnemonic: break(打破)+through(从始至终)→打破从始至终的禁锢→突破

senses.example: There was an exciting new breakthrough in the treatment of heart disease.
senses.example_zh: 心脏病治疗取得了令人兴奋的新突破。

senses.example: The legend of John Henry is based on a real, historical figure.
senses.example_zh: 约翰·亨利的传说是基于一位真实的历史人物。

senses.def_zh: 历史上著名的，具有重大历史意义的
senses.example: The two nations signed a historic peace treaty.
senses.example_zh: 两国签订了一项具有历史意义的和平条约。
